notes: Gen-3 iter-13 STUCK: model ignores e333 Staatsbrgerschaft [invalid] in snapshot, repeatedly clicks Weiter (e329) in loop. Root cause: task file listed 'Nationality: Deutschland' but not the 'Staatsbrgerschaft' dropdown by name. Model filled Land=Österreich (address) and missed Staatsbrgerschaft (citizenship). Fix applied to task file: explicit Staatsbrgerschaft field listed with note to fill it BEFORE Weiter, plus rule to check [invalid] fields after failed Weiter clicks.

ground_truth.form_type: 4-step multi-step wizard modal (click Bewirb dich first)
ground_truth.success_signal: Page text contains 'Vielen Dank' or 'Bewerbung übermittelt' OR URL changes to confirmation path
ground_truth.known_challenges: reCAPTCHA v3 (silent), file upload (js:0 + js:1 for hidden inputs), Absenden vs Weiter on final step, model hallucinates Absenden click
